message:
fix: add specific error handling for missing FTS table

When cass search fails with "no such table: fts_messages", now provide
specific guidance to run `cass doctor --fix` which will recreate the
FTS table. Also update the fallback error message to suggest running
cass doctor --fix first.

Addresses issue #17 where users see FTS errors but aren't given clear
guidance on how to fix them.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
